reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 4.4% and 20-day momentum is 12.5%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 6.1% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.2%, downside volatility near 0.9%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is -30.7% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 2.3% versus SPY over 5 days and 1.2% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is neutral with score 0.52, confidence 0.61, and 0.1 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow neutral at 0.52, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.1 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.70, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.61.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.087 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Bank of America Reports Growth in Demand for AI enabled Treasury and FX Tools Across APAC Region
news_evidence.llm_reason: Direct Bank of America announcement about increased demand for its AI-enabled treasury and FX tools in APAC. This is company-specific and supports modest near-term revenue/fee growth expectations, but the effect is likely limited in magnitude over a 1–10 trading day horizon.
